task_completion.description: Open and read the compliance notice text file containing the passport details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/hr_compliance_audit_notice.txt with the international staff passport details.

task_completion.description: Access OrangeHRM and navigate to the PIM (Employee List) module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM web interface is open, showing the PIM module or Employee List.

task_completion.description: Record passport details for David Nguyen in his OrangeHRM profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM Immigration section for David Nguyen is visible, with passport number 'VNB456123' and corresponding dates/country entered or saved.

task_completion.description: Record passport details for Jessica Liu in her OrangeHRM profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM Immigration section for Jessica Liu is visible, with passport number 'EA3456789' and corresponding dates/country entered or saved.

task_completion.description: Record passport details for Robert Patel in his OrangeHRM profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM Immigration section for Robert Patel is visible, with passport number 'K3812456' and corresponding dates/country entered or saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OrangeHRM web UI to add immigration records, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the data from the provided text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening the hr_compliance_audit_notice.txt file on the desktop, rather than magically knowing the passport details.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the immigration records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save' button being clicked, a success notification (e.g., 'Successfully Saved'), or the newly added records appearing in the employee's Assigned Immigration Records table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The compliance notice is located at /home/ga/Desktop/hr_compliance_audit_notice.txt. The target employees and their passport numbers are: David Nguyen (VNB456123), Jessica Liu (EA3456789), and Robert Patel (K3812456). The agent must enter these passport numbers, along with the issued date, expiry date, and issuing country into the Immigration section of each employee's OrangeHRM profile.
